---
title: "Incidencia"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(fs)
root <- normalizePath("..\\..\\..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
read_csv_safe <- function(...) readr::read_csv(fs::path(root, ...), show_col_types = FALSE)
asr <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","RATES","incidence_rates_asr_period.csv")
annual <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","RATES","incidence_rates_crude_annual.csv")
top10 <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","RATES","incidence_rates_top10_by_sex_period.csv")
resolution <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","RATES","incidence_rates_resolution_summary.csv")
crude_only <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","RATES","incidence_rates_crude_only_exceptions.csv")
```

```{r}
asr %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
annual %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
top10 %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
resolution %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
crude_only %>% knitr::kable()
```
